results.rendered_html:
tapta p. p. [tap-kta]
1 Heated, burnt.
2 Red-hot, hot.
3 Melted, fused.
4 Distressed, pained, afflicted.
5 Practised (as penance).
Comp.
— kāṃcanaṃ gold purified with fire.
— kṛcchraṃ a kind of penance consisting in drinking hot water, milk and ghee for three days each, and inhaling hot air for three days;  Ms. 11. 214 ;  Y. 3. 318. 
— rūpaṃ, -rūpakaṃ purified silver.
